name: AdvancedMD Practice Management & EHR API
what_it_does: AdvancedMD REST API for independent medical practice management and EHR platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient scheduling and appointment workflows, access clinical documentation and SOAP notes, retrieve billing and claims management data, handle insurance eligibility verification, access e-prescribing data, manage patient portal interactions, retrieve financial and collection analytics, and integrate practice management with clinical workflows for independent and specialty practices.
use_cases: Managing patient appointments and scheduling from independent practice automation agents
Accessing clinical notes and care documentation from care coordination agents
Retrieving billing and claims status from revenue cycle management agents
Integrating insurance eligibility from practice workflow automation agents
not_for: Large health systems without independent practice and small office workflow focus
Hospital-based practices without independent billing and practice management needs
Mental health practices requiring 42 CFR Part 2 specific SUD compliance
best_when: An independent physician practice, specialty clinic, or mental health group using AdvancedMD wants AI agents to automate scheduling, clinical documentation, billing workflows, and practice analytics.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient clinical records and billing data are PHI. Independent practice billing data includes sensitive financial information. Automated claims submission must maintain billing compliance and avoid upcoding risks.

auth.notes: AdvancedMD uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Practice-level credentials with clinical, billing, and scheduling scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Marketplace integrations. Webhooks for real-time appointment and clinical events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — independent practice enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly pricing; practice management, EHR, and billing modules
pricing.notes: South Jordan, Utah. Founded 1999. Major independent practice EHR and PM platform. Used by 40,000+ physicians. Acquired by Global Payments (GPN) 2018 for $700M. Strong mental health and specialty focus. Competes with Kareo/Tebra, DrChrono, and Athenahealth for independent practices.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Patient records and billing data are PHI — all PHI handling requires BAA
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Independent practice billing — automated claims require billing compliance review
Mental health notes may require additional privacy protections beyond standard HIPAA
ONC certification requirements apply to clinical data exports
Global Payments acquisition — payment processing tightly integrated with PM workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient PHI and billing data. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC-certified. OAuth2. US data residency. Independent practice billing compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Independent practice billing and clinical data.
